summary:
Ameloblastoma is predominantly benign but exhibits locally aggressive behavior and can cause extensive bony destruction. Though metastasis is extremely rare, documented cases have reported spread to the lungs, lymph nodes, and other sites, confirming that it does not absolutely fail to metastasize.  

\boxed{B}
